title: Studio Ghibli Film
description: A Studio Ghibli theatrical film catalogued by the community-built Studio Ghibli API.

id.description: Unique identifier representing a specific film.

title.description: Title of the film in English.

image.description: URL of the film poster image.

movie_banner.description: URL of the film banner image.

description.description: Plot summary or synopsis of the film.

running_time.description: Running time of the film in minutes.

people.description: People that appear in the film (URL references).

species.description: Species that appear in the film (URL references).

locations.description: Locations that appear in the film (URL references).

vehicles.description: Vehicles that appear in the film (URL references).

url.description: Canonical URL of the film resource.
